mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.user_id, r.activity_id, r.registration_time, r.status, '' as remark, r.create_time, r.update_time, a.title as activity_title, a.start_time as activity_start_time, a.end_time as activity_end_time, u.name as user_name, u.phone as user_phone FROM activity_registration r LEFT JOIN activity a ON r.activity_id = a.id LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id
AND a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{activityTitle}, '%')
AND u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.registration_time DESC
